title: Attractions based on Eva coming to Universal Studios Japan
display_title: Attractions based on Eva coming to Universal Studios Japan
wikitext:
[]: Attractions based on Eva coming to Universal Studios Japan             Quote Post by Dataprime » Fri Aug 01, 2014 1:45 pm I hope they will let me pilot a Eva http://en.rocketnews24.com/2014/08/01/attack-on-titan-and-evangelion-coming-to-universal-studios-japan/

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Aug 01, 2014 2:48 pm 3D ride that emulates using the 3DMG? Probably nothing that will involve the actual pains of piloting.

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Fri Aug 01, 2014 3:18 pm ^ I figured they could rectify that by using electric shocks.

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Fri Aug 01, 2014 3:28 pm I'm not sure whether to squee with Fanboy glee, or face palm at this clear exploitation of a great source material.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Aug 01, 2014 5:10 pm ChaddyManPrime wrote: I figured they could rectify that by using electric shocks.

[]:             Quote Post by Tumbling Down » Wed Aug 06, 2014 10:34 am I hope there will be some decent videos of the ride.. or whatever it is we're getting.

[]:             Quote Post by El Squibbonator » Sat Aug 09, 2014 7:37 pm I wonder if you'll get to have your photo taken with a guy in a Pen-pen costume?

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sat Aug 09, 2014 9:37 pm Pshaw, the new thing is Yuruart!

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Sat Aug 09, 2014 9:59 pm Will they have 2.0 Zeruel as a mascot?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Nov 04, 2014 12:54 am We can now expect with reasonable certainty an Evangelion 4D ride. I personally can also expect with absolute certainty to never have the chance to experience it. On the bright side, it could never possibly live up to what I'm imagining it could be like.

[]:             Quote Post by Rosenakahara » Tue Nov 04, 2014 3:39 am Ray wrote: I'm not sure whether to squee with Fanboy glee, or face palm at this clear exploitation of a great source material.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Nov 07, 2014 1:06 am They'll probably have associated merch available to obtain somehow. Doubt I can go back during that window.

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Mon Dec 08, 2014 4:13 pm tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Dec 08, 2014 4:16 pm Is it just me or does that look like mo-cap instead of animation?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Dec 08, 2014 5:37 pm Mo-cap would fall in line with how Khara was going to try to produce the graphics in Eva Shin.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Dec 08, 2014 6:12 pm I don't think what was clearly an experiment should be extended to mean that was their plan for the final product.

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Fri Jan 02, 2015 8:18 am Trailer for upcoming 4D ride. https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=WGSh0_P362M Edit- It's in the moblie version, my bad I hope it doesn't cause problems.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Jan 02, 2015 8:22 am They should implement a better anti-aliasing.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Jan 02, 2015 8:22 am Yui grabbing the frame and grinning at the audience at the end is just too cute!

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Fri Jan 02, 2015 8:23 am ElMariachi wrote: They should implement a better anti-aliasing.

Article: Attractions based on Eva coming to Universal Studios Japan
 can now expect with reasonable certainty an Evangelion 4D ride. I personally can also expect with absolute certainty to never have the chance to experience it. On the bright side, it could never possibly live up to what I'm imagining it could be like.
